scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @investai/backend" "npm run dev -w @investai/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @investai/shared && npm run build -w @investai/backend && npm run build -w @investai/frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build -w @investai/shared && npm run build -w @investai/frontend
